title: The "UN-POSSIBLE" difficulty
description: A difficulty that's actually IMPOSSIBLE...Good luck, you will need it.
body:
## THIS IS A ALPHA BUILD,MOST THINGS ARE SUBJECT TO CHANGE SO EXPECT BUGS AND GLITCHES!!
This is a difficulty that makes the game so difficult that you CAN NOT beat this without dying ONCE. Infact i am so confident in this that once i finish making the whole pack, it will be so difficult that it breaks the balance of the game ENTIRELY.
### Current features:
1. > Water from cauldrons will evaporate when you are on fire and standing on top OR in.
1. >Endermen automatically get angered once when you get near them.
1. >Killing Endermen in a warped forest is NOT advised.
1. >Fire never goes out.
1. >End crystals automatically get killed(they don't explode) if the player gets near them
     and summon a bunch of "End Stalkers"(Basically renamed phantoms).
1. >ALL naturally spawning mobs(Zombies,Skeletons,Creepers and Spiders) are INSANELY powerful.
1. > Flowers and grass give different effects
1. > Lava does WAY TOO MUCH damage.
1. > And more...
